title: Fluffy Earthy Oyster Mushrooms Stir-fry
description: A vegan-friendly date-night Chinese dish featuring earthy and fluffy oyster mushrooms in a quick stir-fry that's sure to impress your partner with its simplicity and flavor.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Vegan or gluten-free soy sauce preferred

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup sliced green onions (green parts only)
1 tablespoon cornstarch
ingredients.notes: For thickening the sauce if desired

instructions: Heat a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add sesame oil and stir-fry onions until they start to soften, about 2 minutes.
Add garlic and bell pepper to the wok, stirring occasionally for another 3-4 minutes until vegetables are tender but still crisp.
Add oyster mushrooms and soy sauce to the pan. Stir until mushrooms have opened up slightly and the liquid has mostly evaporated, about 5-7 minutes more.
If desired, mix cornstarch with a little water in a small bowl, then stir into the mushroom mixture until well combined and thickened, about 2 minutes.
